response.hallucination_details: The resume claims expertise in areas such as 'Creative Storytelling' and 'Visual Arts,' which are not directly relevant to the marketing strategist role. recommendations: Highlight any relevant marketing experience or skills, such as SEO, PPC, or Google Analytics, if applicable.

Include any experience with digital marketing tools or platforms, even if gained informally.
